src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Add a logout endpoint to invalidate the current token.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.human_impl: @PostMapping("/logout") public ResponseEntity<Void> logout() { authService.removeToken(); return new ResponseEntity<>(HttpStatus.OK); }

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Update imports to include new DTOs, constants, and Spring Security classes required for the new endpoints.
Update class documentation to reflect the new purpose of the controller.
Changed the user ID field type from Integer to Long to support larger identifier ranges.
Added an enabled field to track the active status of the user account.
Updated the constructor to map the username from the source User object's getUserName method.
Initialized the enabled field in the constructor with a default true value if the source is null.
Modified isEnabled to return the actual enabled state of the user instead of always returning true.
Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Change the primary key type from Integer to Long to support larger ID ranges and align with common modern practices.
Rename the database table from 'user' to 'users' to follow plural naming conventions.
Rename the 'username' field to 'userName' to adhere to Java camelCase naming standards.
Add a 'fullName' field to store the user's full name separately from the username.
Add an 'enabled' boolean field to explicitly track user account status.
Remove the deprecated 'status' enum field as it is replaced by the 'enabled' boolean and role-based logic.
Refactor role storage from a comma-separated string to a OneToMany relationship with a UserRole entity for better normalization.
Update the getRoles method to derive authorities from the new UserRole relationship instead of parsing a string.
Add Lombok @Builder, @NoArgsConstructor, and @AllArgsConstructor annotations to facilitate object construction.
Extend AbstractAuditBase to automatically include audit fields like creation and update timestamps.
Add Jackson annotations to ignore sensitive or circular reference fields during JSON serialization.
Add a method to convert the User entity to a UserRepresentation DTO for API responses.
Add Lombok @Slf4j annotation to enable structured logging in the exception handler.
Add @ResponseBody to ensure the controller advice returns JSON directly instead of trying to resolve a view.
Add a new handler method for BaseException to return a standardized ErrorResponse.
Add a new handler method for MethodArgumentNotValidException to aggregate validation errors into a single response.
Refactor UserNameAlreadyExistException handler to return ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> instead of ErrorMessage and remove @ResponseStatus.
Add a new handler method for RoleNotFoundException and UserNameNotFoundException to return 404 responses.
Replace javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest with jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest to comply with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
Refactor the exception to extend a custom BaseException instead of RuntimeException to standardize error handling.
Modify the constructor to accept a Map of data and an ErrorCode enum, aligning with the new BaseException contract.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.human_impl: public UserNameAlreadyExistException(Map<String, Object> data) { super(ErrorCode.USER_NAME_ALREADY_EXIST, data); }

src/test/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the newer testing framework.
Replace the JUnit 4 runner with the JUnit 5 extension mechanism for Spring context loading.
Update Spring Test imports to use the JUnit 5 specific extension class instead of the JUnit 4 runner.
Remove the public modifier from the test class to align with JUnit 5 conventions where test classes do not need to be public.
Remove the public modifier from the test method to align with JUnit 5 conventions where test methods do not need to be public.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.1.8 to 3.5.0 to align with Java 21 ecosystem.
Update the project's target Java version from 1.8 to 21.
Define a property for the Guava library version.
Define a property for the JWT library version.
Define a property for the Commons Pool2 library version.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency for bean validation support.
Add Spring Boot Starter Test dependency for testing support.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for security testing support.
Update JJWT API dependency to use the new version property.
Update JJWT Implementation dependency to use the new version property.
Update JJWT Jackson dependency to use the new version property.
Add H2 database dependency for in-memory database support.
Replace legacy MySQL connector with the new com.mysql:mysql-connector-j artifact required for newer Spring Boot versions.
Add Google Guava library dependency.
Add Spring Boot Starter Data Redis dependency for Redis support.
Add Apache Commons Pool2 dependency for connection pooling.
Exclude Lombok from the repackaged Spring Boot jar to reduce size.
Set Maven compiler source level to the project's Java version.
Set Maven compiler target level to the project's Java version.
Enable Java preview features in the compiler arguments.
